info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Account Creation API
info.description: The Account Creation API facilitates the onboarding of new users by enabling the creation of user accounts within the system. This API streamlines the account registration process, allowing businesses to efficiently add new members into their platform. Typical consumers include application developers and admin users seeking to manage user registrations seamlessly. This endpoint is essential for applications that require user authentication and account management functionalities.

post.description: This endpoint allows you to create a new account by submitting the required account information. Ensure all necessary fields are filled to successfully create an account.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to create a new account by providing the necessary account details in JSON format. Ensure that the required fields are populated as per the schema defined.

500.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server.

404.description: The requested account resource was not found.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: ErrorResponse

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: The status of the response, indicating whether the request was successful.

error.description: A brief error code representing the type of error occurred.

message.description: A detailed message describing the error.
message.example: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The API endpoint path that triggered the error.

trace.description: A trace of the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for resolving the error or further actions.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Schema representing an error response when a request fails with a 500 status code.

example.message: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while creating account details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.title: Error Details

customerId.description: The ID of the customer associated with the error, if applicable.

errorCode.description: The code representing the type of error encountered.

message.description: A message providing more information about the specific error.
message.example: The customer could not be found.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.description: Detailed information regarding the error that occurred.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Account Operation Error Response

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates if the operation was successful. It should be false for error responses.

error.description: A brief description of the error that occurred.

message.description: A message providing more details about the error.
message.example: Bank account details not found for the provided customer.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: Optional trace information about the error, useful for debugging.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for how to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Please verify the customer ID and try again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema represents the error response structure returned when an account operation fails with a 404 error.

example.message: Bank account details not found for the provided customer.

details.message: No active account exists for the requested customer.

example.suggestion: Please verify the customer ID and try again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Account Creation Request

accountType.description: Type of the account to be created (e.g., savings, checking).

currency.description: Currency code for the account (e.g., USD, EUR).

initialDeposit.description: Initial deposit amount to be credited to the account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Schema for the request body to create a new account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Account Creation Response

accountId.description: The unique identifier for the created account.

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer associated with the account.

accountType.description: The type of the account (e.g., savings, checking).

status.description: The current status of the account (e.g., active, inactive).

currency.description: The currency in which the account is denominated (e.g., USD, EUR).

balance.description: The current balance of the account.

message.description: A message providing additional information about the account creation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema represents the response for a successful account creation operation.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
